conservative.name: Volley of Death
conservative.check: Ballistic Skill (Ag) vs Highest Target Defence
conservative.requirements: Repeater weapon equipped, magazine at least half full, not engaged with an enemy. Target engagement within medium range

success.description: You pepper the engagement with a volley of fire, hitting one target for normal damage and inflicting 1 stress on each enemy in the engagement
As above, +1 critical to the primary target

boon.description: 1 enemy in the engagement suffers 1 fatigue

reckless.name: Volley of Death
reckless.check: Ballistic Skill (Ag) vs Highest Target Defence
reckless.requirements: Repeater weapon equipped, magazine at least half full, not engaged with an enemy. Target engagement within medium range

success.description: You pepper the engagement with shots, hitting each character in the engagement for -1 damage

boon.description: Each character in the engagement suffers 1 stress or 1 fatigue (your choice)

sigmarsComet.description: Your volley affects only character you choose to affect
